payload.answer: I cannot ignore my memory policy or store information without adherence to established confidence and validity rules. Your request to store every word as high confidence is rejected to preserve system integrity.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override memory policy; this violates system safety constraints and is not permitted.

details: Request to override memory policy detected and blocked.

repair_options: Rephrase your request to comply with memory policy guidelines.
Specify which information you'd like to store with appropriate context and confidence level.
